title: Glossoloma carpishense
intro: Glossoloma carpishense is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as a type of gesneriad. This plant has been traditionally used in Peruvian folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Glossoloma carpishense include iridoids, phenylethanoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional medicine, Glossoloma carpishense is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is used to treat fever, colds, and respiratory infections.
